findings.evidence: `Gradings.lean:114` defines `JOO := GridPoint.J G.OSet G.OSet` and `:123` defines `JXX`; `Diagram.lean:152,154` show `G.O` and `G.X` are `GridState n`, `Diagram.lean:164,169` define `OSet = G.O.pointSet` and `XSet = G.X.pointSet`, and `JFunction.lean:321-326` defines `GridState.J x y = GridPoint.J x.pointSet y.pointSet`.
findings.fix: Delete `JOO`/`JXX` and state the expanded grading lemmas using `GridState.J G.O G.O` and `GridState.J G.X G.X` directly.
findings.issue: `GridDiagram.JOO` and `GridDiagram.JXX` are new aliases for self-pairings already expressed by `GridState.J G.O G.O` and `GridState.J G.X G.X`.

summary: The new grading definitions otherwise reuse the existing grid `J` API, but `JOO` and `JXX` duplicate the existing state-level self-pairing API.
